title: Android开发:ListView的使用方法
content:
什么是ListView

ListView绝对可以称得上是Android中最常用的控件之一，几乎所有的应用程序都会用到它，由于手机屏幕空间有限，能够一次性在屏幕上显示的内容并不多，当我们的程序中有大量的数据需要展示的时候，就可以借助ListView来实现。比如查看微信聊天记录，查看微博消息，等等。

ListView的简单用法1

  • 首先创建你要显示的资源，这里显示简单字符串数组数据，在res/values下新建array.xml。
    <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<resources>
    <string-array name="arrayList">
        <item>全部</item>
        <item>电影</item>
        <item>图书</item>
        <item>游戏</item>
    </string-array>
</resources>
  • 建立布局文件，在布局中加入ListView控件，宽高可以都设置成match_parent,使其充满布局空间，并设置一个id。添加android:entries属性，将数组资源导入。
    <ListView
      android:id="@+id/listView"
      android:layout_width="match_parent"
      android:layout_height="match_parent"
      android:entries="@array/arrayList">
  • 效果图

ListView的简单用法2

  • 同样新建布局文件，在布局中加入ListView控件,只不过不需要添加android:entries属性。
    <ListView
      android:id="@+id/listView"
      android:layout_width="match_parent"
      android:layout_height="match_parent">
  • 在Activity里，将数据通过Adapter传递给ListView。首先我们要准备数据，可以是通过后台获取的数据，这里我们用数组代替。利用ArrayAdapter，指定其泛型为String，ArrayAdapte的构造函数中依次传入当前上下文，ListView子项布局的id，以及要适配的数据。最后用ListView的setAdapter方法将适配器传进去。
    注意：android.R.layout.simple_list_item_1是Android内置的布局文件，里面只有一个TextView.
 public class MainActivity extends AppCompatActivity {
   private String[] array = {"全部","游戏","电影","图书","科技","热点","军事","音乐"};
   @Override
     protected void onCreate(Bundle savedInstanceState) {
         super.onCreate(savedInstanceState);
         setContentView(R.layout.activity_main);
         ArrayAdapter<String> adapter = new ArrayAdapter<String>(MainActivity.this,android.R.layout.simple_list_item_1,array);
         ListView listView = findViewById(R.id.listView);
         listView.setAdapter(adapter);
     }
}
  • 效果图

ListView的简单用法3（定制ListView界面）

  • 定义一个实体类people,作为ListView适配器的适配类型。

    public class People {
  private int peopleImageId;
  private String peopleName;

  public People(int peopleImageId, String peopleName) {
      this.peopleImageId = peopleImageId;
      this.peopleName = peopleName;
  }

  public int getPeopleImageId() {
      return peopleImageId;
  }

  public void setPeopleImageId(int peopleImageId) {
      this.peopleImageId = peopleImageId;
  }

  public String getPeopleName() {
      return peopleName;
  }

  public void setPeopleName(String peopleName) {
      this.peopleName = peopleName;
  }
}

  • 为ListView的子项指定一个我们自己定义的布局文件people_item.xml。

    <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<LinearLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android"
        android:orientation="horizontal" android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="match_parent">

    <ImageView
            android:id="@+id/people_image"
            android:layout_width="100dp"
            android:layout_height="100dp"/>
    <TextView
            android:id="@+id/people_name"
            android:layout_width="wrap_content"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:gravity="center_vertical"/>
</LinearLayout>

  • 创建一个自己的适配器PeopleAdapter，并继承自ArrayAdapter，重写构造方法和getView方法。

    public class PeopleAdapter extends ArrayAdapter<People> {
  private int resourceId;

  public PeopleAdapter(@NonNull Context context,  int resourceId, @NonNull List<People> objects) {
      super(context, resourceId, objects);
      this.resourceId = resourceId;
  }

  @NonNull
  @Override
  public View getView(int position, @Nullable View convertView, @NonNull ViewGroup parent) {
      People people = getItem(position);
      View view;
      ViewHolder viewHolder;

      if(convertView == null){
          view = LayoutInflater.from(getContext()).inflate(resourceId,parent,false);
          viewHolder = new ViewHolder();
          viewHolder.peopleImage = view.findViewById(R.id.people_image);
          viewHolder.peopleName = view.findViewById(R.id.people_name);
          view.setTag(viewHolder);
      }else{
          view = convertView;
          viewHolder = (ViewHolder) view.getTag();
      }
      viewHolder.peopleImage.setImageResource(people.getPeopleImageId());
      viewHolder.peopleName.setText(people.getPeopleName());
      return view;
  }

  class ViewHolder{
      ImageView peopleImage;
      TextView peopleName;
  }
}

  • 在Activity中初始化数据，并数据传入PeopleAdapter，最后用ListView的setAdapter方法将适配器传进去。

    public class MainActivity extends AppCompatActivity {
  @Override
  protected void onCreate(Bundle savedInstanceState) {
      super.onCreate(savedInstanceState);
      setContentView(R.layout.activity_main);
      final List<People> datas = initDatas();
      PeopleAdapter peopleAdapter = new PeopleAdapter(MainActivity.this,R.layout.people_item,datas);
      ListView listView = findViewById(R.id.listview);
      listView.setAdapter(peopleAdapter);
  }

  private List<People> initDatas() {
      List<People> datas = new ArrayList<>();
      datas.add(new People(R.drawable.me,"鼬神"));
      datas.add(new People(R.drawable.me,"鼬神"));
      datas.add(new People(R.drawable.me,"鼬神"));
      datas.add(new People(R.drawable.me,"鼬神"));
      datas.add(new People(R.drawable.me,"鼬神"));
      return datas;
  }
}

  • 效果图

  • 当然，你也可以为ListView添点击事件，长按事件等等。

    listView.setOnItemClickListener(new AdapterView.OnItemClickListener() {
  @Override
  public void onItemClick(AdapterView<?> parent, View view, int position, long id) {
      Toast.makeText(MainActivity.this,"This is me",Toast.LENGTH_LONG).show();
  }
});
